channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: General rubbish and lots of cardboard, 19th June
item.description:
Looks like someone has recently moved in and not disposed of their moving boxes and general rubbish, none in Southwark bins
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 347, Crystal Palace Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Another day another dump, 19th June
item.description:
Can you come and clean this up please and may reconsider investigating it and/or fines for the people doing it. The rotten food is encouraging pests and puts our kids at risk .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clements Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed dumped car, 19th June
item.description:
There is a Nissan juke registration (HG62WUL) it seems every time a car that's been sitting there for four weeks is usually replaced by another car by the same people it's getting ridiculous probably owned by the tyre fitters in Colyers lane...also I've heard that most of the untaxed cars in Colyers lane are owned by them...
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swallow Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: LIME Again, 19th June
item.description:
Same rider leaving LIME hire bike here again blocking pavePment.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 182, Tressillian Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electrics recycling is open, 19th June
item.description:
Next to the Camberwell Road/Albany Road (Stop N) is a small container to dispose of electrical waste such as batteries and small devices. The door to the container is open and on 2 separate occasions, I’ve seen people stealing the waste. The container needs to be secured.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive rubbish, 19th June
item.description:
Same issue every week with rubbish not being collected

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Llanover Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disgusting waste on the street, 19th June
item.description:
Loads of tipped rubbish, chairs, restaurant waste etc. just left on the floor by the bins outside my office (KFH)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tranquil Passage, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Lots of flyipping, 19th June
item.description:
Lots of bags of flight tipped waste on the road which was very smelly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 646, Lordship Lane, Harringay, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very spiky tree growing over pavement, 19th June
item.description:
Very spiky tree is growing out of the tree hole in the pavement and blocking off the pavement. It also appears to have runners that are growing through the pavement in multiple places, lifting the tarmac, which will require significant works to fix if not dealt with promptly. The spiky tree has been there for over a year, but is occasionally cut back by locals. The proper fix would be to poison it and dig out the roots. The runners will also need to be poisoned and dug up and the pavement relaid.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lansdowne Gardens, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Egerton Drive, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet
